description: A control room operator receives an alert from the leak detection system and must verify if it's a real leak or a false alarm.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the high-priority leak alarm for pipeline segment PL-789.

expected_outcome.value: The alarm is acknowledged in the SCADA system.

nodes.task_description: Analyze real-time and historical pressure and flow rate data upstream and downstream of the alarm location.

expected_outcome.value: Operator identifies a pressure drop and flow mismatch indicative of a real leak.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the emergency shutdown procedure for the affected pipeline segment and dispatch a field crew.

expected_outcome.value: The pipeline segment is safely isolated, and a crew is dispatched to the location.
